    Recent

      Ask the knowledge base

      Answers are grounded in current statute law and every claim is cited. Open any citation to read the source.

      /
      Common questions

      Sources

      Sample enquiries

      Load a recent inbound message to see how it is captured.

        Inbound enquiry

        Paste a call note, an email or a contact-form submission. It is classified, deadline-checked and turned into a mandate record with a drafted reply.

        Settings

        Answer synthesis

        Retrieval always runs locally in this browser. Connect a model to have answers written from the retrieved passages; without one, the hub returns the passages themselves and pre-written answers for common questions rather than generating text.

        Stored only in this browser's localStorage and sent only to api.anthropic.com. Never transmitted anywhere else.

        Data sources

        …

        Statute text from gesetze-im-internet.de (Bundesministerium der Justiz / Bundesamt für Justiz), ingested unmodified.

        TaxHub is a support tool for the practice. Its output is not tax advice and requires professional review before use.
